{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Makiel's First Division
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Makiel's First Division]] is known as the [[Hounds]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
